author: gb9t
content: Phase C /loop iter 52: 2 Tier-3 ipset docs (core framework + 11-variant hash family). net/netfilter/ipset/core.md (struct ip_set + ip_set_type + ip_set_type_variant layouts, full IPSET_CMD_* dispatch CREATE/DESTROY/FLUSH/RENAME/SWAP/LIST/SAVE/ADD/DEL/TEST/HEADER/TYPE/PROTOCOL/GET_BYNAME/GET_BYINDEX, atomic SWAP under paired per-set locks, per-element ext_* TIMEOUT/COUNTERS/COMMENT/SKBINFO, periodic GC for TIMEOUT sets, in-kernel ip_set_test/_add/_del hot path for xt_set+nft+em_ipset consumers, ip_set_getport+pfxlen helpers, protocol-revision negotiation — 13 REQ / 13 AC, 0 open) + net/netfilter/ipset/types-hash.md (11 hash variants: hash:ip/mac/net/net,iface/net,port/net,net/net,port,net/ip,mac/ip,mark/ip,port/ip,port,ip/ip,port,net; ip_set_hash_gen.h template-generated test/add/del/kadt/uadt; IPv4+IPv6 dual-mode; per-set CIDR-count tracking for hash:net* fast-walk; jhash w/ LATENT_ENTROPY-seeded per-set perturbation defense vs hash-collision DoS; resize during concurrent test via RCU; MAXELEM cap w/ FORCEADD evict-oldest — 12 REQ / 14 AC, 0 open). 16 upstream paths validated against baseline 27a26ccfd528. Total: 143 .design docs. netfilter: 20 of 22 children done; ipset 2 of 4 children done. Next: net/netfilter/ipvs/00-overview.md (sub-Tier-2 wrapper for IPVS L4 load balancer) + net/netfilter/conntrack-bpf.md (BPF kfunc set for conntrack — last conntrack child).
